transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a man and a woman.

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Are you going to the student government candidate debate tonight?

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Yes. I want to hear the candidates' ideas before I vote next week.

transcript.question_intro: Why is the woman attending the debate?

questions.prompt: Why is the woman attending the debate?

choices.text: To learn about the candidates before voting.

questions.explanation: She wants to hear the candidates' ideas before voting.
questions.evidence: I want to hear the candidates' ideas before I vote next week.
